{"id":"smallhold-yfhy.1","title":"FEP-8fcf: Follower Collection Synchronization","description":"Implement follower sync per FEP-8fcf.

**Spec:** https://codeberg.org/fediverse/fep/src/branch/main/fep/8fcf/fep-8fcf.md

**Requirements:**
- Generate SHA256 XOR digest of follower URIs for Collection-Synchronization header
- Include header in responses to Follow/Undo activities
- Parse incoming Collection-Synchronization headers
- On digest mismatch, fetch remote followers collection and reconcile
- Handle adds/removes to sync follower state

**Why:** Detects and corrects follower drift between instances without manual intervention.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:38.023348077Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:38.023348077Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-yfhy.1","depends_on_id":"smallhold-yfhy","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:27:38.037416796Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: FEP-8fcf implemented: digest computation, outbound header, inbound check, 6 tests
